ques: Browse Apple Music on the entertainment section of the Apple's website, and see which singers' names are included in the pictures on this page.
answer: On the Apple Music block of Apple's Entertainment page, the only singer's name printed in the pictures is Sabrina Carpenter (the "Sabrina Carpenter & Zane Lowe" interview cover). The other gallery covers are playlist titles (New Music Daily, Alpha Women, Today's Hits, Rap Life, ¡Dale Play!, Today's Country, A-List Pop) and don't show a singer's name.
